title: Senior Doctor - Apollo Hospitals - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Apollo Hospitals - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
